summary: Phase 1 gating + Google OAuth wiring tested. 26/27 backend tests pass (1 backend gating bug found). Frontend phase-1 enforcement is mostly correct, but the /leagues page sport filter dropdown still includes a Cricket option. Google OAuth endpoint, button placement, and redirect URL all verified correctly.

critical.issue: Returns India cities (7 entries) — Phase 1 gating not applied. Spec requires this to return [] when PHASE=1. /api/cities default already correctly filters to USA, but the explicit ?country=India query parameter bypasses the phase gate. Fix in /app/backend/server.py get_cities(): if country and country != ACTIVE_COUNTRY: return []

minor.issue: Called by frontend even when unauthenticated, producing 401 console errors for guest users on /leagues page (carried over from iteration_1)

ui_bugs.issue: Sport filter <select> still lists 'Cricket' option alongside Tennis & Pickleball. Spec requires Phase 1 filter to show only active sports. Other Phase 1 UI (Home, Footer, Auth subtitle, Admin Create form, /sport/cricket redirect, navbar) all read activeSports correctly — this dropdown was missed.

issues: Start Date / End Date use the browser-default native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of a shadcn Calendar component — inconsistent with the rest of the shadcn UI

action_items: Fix GET /api/cities to enforce Phase 1 country gate when explicit ?country= is passed — return [] if country not in ACTIVE_COUNTRY (mirror logic in league_routes.get_leagues)
Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/Leagues.jsx sport filter dropdown to map over activeSports (or filter SPORTS by isSportActive) — currently still hardcoded with Cricket
(Optional / carry-over) Skip /api/leagues/my call from frontend when no auth cookie is present — eliminates 401 console noise
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py get_cities() lacks the Phase-1 country guard that league_routes.py already implements — duplicated gating logic; consider extracting a helper apply_phase_filter(query, country, sport) used by both endpoints

Google OAuth endpoint properly returns 401 on invalid session_id, exchanges via Emergent /session-data, upserts user keyed by lowercased email, and reissues the same JWT cookies (consistent with existing auth middleware) — implementation looks clean
/api/phase endpoint correctly returns {phase:1, active_sports:['tennis','pickleball'], active_country:'USA', currency:'USD', payment_provider:'stripe'}
GET /api/leagues correctly returns only tennis+pickleball+USA leagues across all filter combinations (?sport=cricket → [], ?country=India → [], default → 8 leagues all USA tennis/pickleball)

Frontend Auth page correctly places Google button ABOVE the email/password form with an 'OR' divider (data-testid='google-signin-btn' present, btn y=476 < email y=604), subtitle reads 'Competitive Tennis & Pickleball leagues across the USA.', only Tennis & Pickleball badges shown
Google button click navigates to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fracquet-cricket-hub.preview.emergentagent.com%2Fdashboard — correct origin-derived redirect
Admin Dashboard create-league form: Sport=[Tennis,Pickleball], Country=[🇺🇸 USA] only — correctly phase-gated
Footer correctly lists only Tennis + Pickleball under SPORTS and shows 'Competitive Tennis & Pickleball leagues across the USA.'
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (added Phase-1 gating tests, /api/phase test, Google OAuth invalid-session test, India-blocked tests for /cities and /leagues)
seed_data_creation: TEST_E2E Tennis League form was filled in admin dashboard but submission listener race did not confirm; previous pytest test_create_league_admin POST /api/leagues returns 200 with id, so admin create flow is functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 backend gating works for /api/leagues (all combos) and /api/phase. Single bug: /api/cities ignores Phase gate when ?country=India explicitly sent — returns India cities. Frontend bug: /leagues page sport filter dropdown still hardcodes Cricket. Everything else (Home, Auth Google btn, /sport/cricket redirect, Footer, Admin form, JWT login, OAuth endpoint 401 on invalid session) is correct. Tests file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported to base URL.

rca_of_issues.cities_india_bug: In /app/backend/server.py get_cities(country=None): query = {'country': country if country else ACTIVE_COUNTRY}. Default branch correctly defaults to USA, but the explicit-country branch trusts whatever the client passes, never checking against ACTIVE_COUNTRY. Fix: add `if country and country != ACTIVE_COUNTRY: return []` before building the query (mirrors league_routes.py:38-39).
rca_of_issues.leagues_filter_cricket_bug: /app/frontend/src/pages/Leagues.jsx sport filter <select> appears to render a static SPORTS array containing all three sports rather than using activeSports from platformConfig. The other Leagues.jsx code paths read activeSports correctly per the iteration spec, but this <select> was missed.
